source.sqlReaderQuery:
With GUILD_QUALITY_DIVISION AS (

SELECT *,
	CASE 	--WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Mad City Window%' THEN 'MAC'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Pacific Bath%' THEN 'PBC'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Statewid%' THEN 'SWR'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%FHIA%' THEN 'FHI'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Max%' THEN 'FHI'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Rite Window%' THEN 'RTW'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Home Organization%' THEN 'CTA'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Home Smart%' THEN 'HSI'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Renuity%' THEN 'CTA'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Closet America%' THEN 'CTA'
			--ELSE 'Kohler'
			WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%MAC%' THEN 'MAC'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%PBC%' THEN 'PBC'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%SWR%' THEN 'SWR'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%FHI%' THEN 'FHI'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%MXH%' THEN 'FHI'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%RTW%' THEN 'RTW'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%CTA%' THEN 'CTA'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%HSI%' THEN 'HSI'
            ELSE 'Kohler'
        END AS DIVISION

	FROM 
		OUT.GUILD_QUALITY_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_PAGINATION_NEW_SURVEY  G
		WHERE SURVEYSTATUS!='Completed'
),
GUILD_QUALITY_DATA AS 
(

Select G.* ,	
	  F.ENTRYDATE,
	  F.SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
	  F.SalesRep2_EmployeeID,
	  F.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
	  F.LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID,
	  F.APPTDATE,
	  B.BranchID as BRANCHID_NG,
	  F.PRODUCTID,
	  F.LP_PRODUCTID,
	  B.LP_BRANCHID,
	  B.ReportingMarketID,
	  B.LP_ReportingMarketID,
	  B.LP_ReportingMarketTypeID,
	  B.ReportingMarketTypeID
	  
	  
	  from (
	  
		SELECT G.*,
			COALESCE(L.CUSTOMERID,J.CUSTOMERID)		CUSTOMERID ,
			COALESCE(L.LEADID,J.LEADID)               EDW_LEADID ,
			COALESCE(J.JOBID,J1.JOBID)                JOBID,
			COALESCE(L.LP_CUSTOMERID,J.LP_CUSTOMERID) LP_CUSTOMERID ,
			--J.LP_LEADID, 
			COALESCE(J.INSTALLERID_1,J1.INSTALLERID_1)	INSTALLERID_1,
			COALESCE(J.InstallerID_2,J1.InstallerID_2)	InstallerID_2,
			COALESCE(J.InstallerID_3,J1.InstallerID_3)	InstallerID_3,
			COALESCE(J.InstallerID_4,J1.InstallerID_4)	InstallerID_4,
			COALESCE(J.LP_INSTALLERID_1,J1.LP_INSTALLERID_1) LP_INSTALLERID_1,
			COALESCE(J.LP_InstallerID_2,J1.LP_InstallerID_2) LP_InstallerID_2,
			COALESCE(J.LP_InstallerID_3,J1.LP_InstallerID_3) LP_InstallerID_3,
			COALESCE(J.LP_InstallerID_4,J1.LP_InstallerID_4) LP_InstallerID_4 
			FROM 
				GUILD_QUALITY_DIVISION G
				LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON G.DIVISION=J.DIVISION AND G.EXTERNAL_ID=J.CONTRACTID --AND Round(G.VALUE,2) =Round(J.GROSSAMOUNT,2)---5555
				LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J1 ON G.DIVISION=J1.DIVISION AND G.LEADID=J1.LP_LEADID
				LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_LEAD L ON  G.DIVISION=L.DIVISION AND G.LEADID=L.LP_LEADID
			
	        ) G 
			Left join EDW.FACT_LEAD F ON  G.DIVISION=F.DIVISION AND G.EDW_LEADID=F.LEADID
			Left join EDW.DIM_BRANCH B ON F.DIVISION=B.DIVISION AND F.BRANCHID=B.BRANCHID

)

Select 
[Survey_ID]     								[Survey_ID] 										,
CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(Response_date, 19), 126)					[Response_Date]                     ,
CASE WHEN [Program] like '%DNS%' THEN 'Demo No Sale Experience'
WHEN [Program] like '%Overall%' THEN 'Installation Experience New' END AS [Program]                 ,
[CustomerID] 									[CustomerID]                                        ,
[EDW_LEADID] 									[LeadID]                                            ,
[SalesRep1_EmployeeID] 							[SalesRep1_EmployeeID]                              ,
[SalesRep2_EmployeeID] 							[SalesRep2_EmployeeID]                              ,
[BRANCHID_NG] 									[BranchID]                                          ,
[BRANCHID] 										[BranchID_GQ]                                       ,
[ApptDate] 										[ApptDate]                                          ,
[EXTERNAL_ID] 									[ContractID]                                        ,
[DIVISION] 										[Division]                                          ,
[ProductID] 									[ProductID]                                         ,
[InstallerID_1] 								[InstallerID_1]                                     ,
[InstallerID_2] 								[InstallerID_2]                                     ,
[InstallerID_3] 								[InstallerID_3]                                     ,
[InstallerID_4] 								[InstallerID_4]                                     ,
[productline] 									[Product_Line_InstallationExperience]               ,
CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(Creationdate, 19), 126)					[Date_To_Survey]                                    ,
'US'											[Country]                                           ,
'English'										[Language]                                          ,
NULL 											[Unit]                                              ,
SOLD											[Sold]                                              ,
NULL											[DevelopmentCycle]                                  ,
[SalesOrganization] 							[SalesOrganization]                                 ,
NULL											[Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations]                ,
NULL 											[Main_Metric]                                       ,
CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(ServiceDate, 19), 126) 	[Service_Datetime]                                  ,
[CHANNEL] 										[Channel]                                           ,
[productline] 									[ProductLine_InHomeConsultationExperience]          ,
NULL											[Social_Unit_ID]                                    ,
NULL 											[On_Site_Quote_Satisfaction_Team_Score]             ,
NULL 											[Reason_for_Score]                                  ,
[Sales_Understanding] 							[Sales_Understanding]                               ,
[Sales_Communication] 							[Sales_Communication]                               ,
[Sales_Punctuality] 							[Sales_Punctuality]                                 ,
[Sales_Professionalism] 						[Sales_Professionalism]                             ,
[Sales_Product_Knowledge] 						[Sales_Product_Knowledge]                           ,
[Completeness_Of_Information] 					[Completeness_Of_Information]                       ,
[Received_Quote] 								[Received_Quote]                                    ,
[Satisfaction_With_Quote] 						[Satisfaction_With_Quote]                           ,
[Quote_Project_Start_Date] 						[Quote_Project_Start_Date]                          ,
[Product_Demo] 									[Product_Demo]                                      ,
[Product_Demo_Benefits] 						[Product_Demo_Benefits]                             ,
[Reason_For_Not_Moving_Forward] 				[Reason_For_Not_Moving_Forward]                     ,
[Decided_Against_Other] 						[Decided_Against_Other]                             ,
[Final_Comment] 								[Final_Comment]                                     ,
[Service_NPS] 									[Service_NPS]                                       ,
NULL					 						[Reasons_For_Your_Score]                            ,
NULL											[Give_More_Feedback]                                ,
[In_Home_Sales_Rating] 							[In_Home_Sales]                                     ,
	[Install_Team_Rating] 						[Install_Team]                                      ,
	[Installation_Rating] 						[Installation]                                      ,
[Product_Walkthrough] 							[Product_Walkthrough]                               ,
[Experience_Rating] 							[Experience]                                        ,
[Satisfaction_Rating] 							[Satisfaction]                                      ,
NULL 											[Areas_For_Improvement]                             ,
NULL											[Areas_Of_Satisfaction]                             ,
[Testimonial] 									[Testimonial]                                       ,
[Additional_Comments] 							[Additional_Comments]                               ,
[Professionalism_Rating]						[Professionalism]									,
[Clarity_Helpfulness_Rating]					[Clarity_Helpfulness]								,
[Future_COnsideration_Rating]					[Future_Consideration]								,
[ReasonForConsideration_Rating]					[Reason_For_Consideration]							,
[OtherReasonforConsideration]					[Other_Reason_For_Consideration]					,
[AdditionalFeedback]							[Additional_Feedback]								,
[SalesExperience]								[Sales_Experience]									,
[InstallationQuality]							[Installation_Quality]								,
[OverallSatisfaction]							[Overall_Satisfaction]								,
[AccountID] 									[LP_CustomerID]                                     ,
[LeadID] 										[LP_LeadID]                                         ,
[LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID] 						[LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID]                           ,
[LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID] 						[LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID]                           ,
[LP_BranchID]         							[LP_BranchID]                                       ,
[LP_ProductID]        							[LP_ProductID]                                      ,
[LP_InstallerID_1]    							[LP_InstallerID_1]                                  ,
[LP_InstallerID_2]    							[LP_InstallerID_2]                                  ,
[LP_InstallerID_3]    							[LP_InstallerID_3]                                  ,
[LP_InstallerID_4]    							[LP_InstallerID_4]                                  ,
GETDATE()										[LastUpdateTS]                                      ,
ReportingMarketID								[ReportingMarket_ID]                                ,
LP_ReportingMarketID 							[LP_ReportingMarket_ID]                             ,
LP_ReportingMarketTypeID						[LP_ReportingMarketTypeID]                          ,
ReportingMarketTypeID							[ReportingMarketTypeID]                             ,
[ACCOUNTID] 									[Medallia_AccountID]                                ,
NULL											[Medallia_SalesRepID1]                              ,
NULL											[Medallia_ServiceTechID1]                           ,
NULL 											[SalesRepActiveFlag]                            ,
[Testimonial_Comments] 							[Testimonial_Additional_Comments]               ,
NULL											[Demonstration_Additional_Comments]             ,
NULL											[Experience_Additional_Comments]                ,
NULL											[Likely_To_Recommend_Additional_Comments]       ,
NULL											[Satisfaction_Additional_Comments]              ,
NULL											[In_Home_Sales_Additional_Comments]         ,
NULL											[Install_Team_Additional_Comments]              ,
NULL											[Installation_Additional_Comments]              ,
	[Areas_For_Improvement_Comment] 			[Area_For_Improvement_Additional_Comments]      ,
	[Areas_Of_Satisfaction_Comment] 			[Area_Of_Satisfaction_Additional_Comments]      ,
	NULL										[Area_For_Improvement_Rating]                   ,
	NULL										[Area_Of_Satisfaction_Rating]                   ,
	[Program]									[Template]                                      ,
	NULL										[GuildQuality_Survey_Id]                        ,
	VALUE										[Amount]                                        ,
	[Surveystatus] 								[Survey_status]                                 ,
CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(ContactCreationDate, 19), 126)			[Customer_Creation_Date]                        ,
CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(ProjectStartDate, 19), 126)				[Project_Start_Date]                            ,
CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(Creationdate, 19), 126)					[Creation_date]                                  ,
CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(surveyEnddate, 19), 126)					[Expiry_Date] 									,	
	NULL 										[Satisfaction_Score_in_Percentage]              ,
	[NeedsAction] 								[Needs_Action]                                  ,
	[Notes] 									[Notes]                                         ,
	[GoogleReviewBoost] 						[Google_Review_Boost]                           ,
	[VIPProgramAwarenessChoice] 				[VIP_Program_Awareness_Choice]                  ,
	[VIPProgramAwarenessComment] 				[VIP_Program_Awareness_Comment]                 ,
	[Testimonial_Choice] 						[Testimonial_Choice]                            ,
	[Testimonial_Comment] 						[Testimonial_Comment]                           ,
	[ReferralProgramAwareness_Choice] 			[Referral_Program_Awareness_Choice]             ,
	[ReferralProgramAwareness_Comment] 			[Referral_Program_Awareness_Comment]            ,
	'Guild Quality'								[SurveyFlag]                                    ,
	--'0'											[ActiveInd]                                     ,
	CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(updatedAt, 19), 126)	                     updatedAt                                                                 ,
	CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(LastActivityAt, 19), 126)	             LastActivityAt                                                                

 from 
		(
		Select *,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Survey_ID ORDER BY EntryDate DESC) as rownum
		from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA
		)b
	where rownum=1

WITH GUILD_QUALITY_DIVISION AS (
    -- Defines the Division based on Brand, focusing on the source data.
    SELECT TOP 1000 *,
        CASE
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Mad City Window%' THEN 'MAC'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Pacific Bath%' THEN 'PBC'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Statewid%' THEN 'SWR'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%FHIA%' THEN 'FHI'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Max%' THEN 'FHI'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Rite Window%' THEN 'RTW'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Home Organization%' THEN 'CTA'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Home Smart%' THEN 'HSI'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Renuity%' THEN 'CTA'
            --WHEN G.Brand LIKE '%Closet America%' THEN 'CTA'
            --ELSE 'Kohler'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%MAC%' THEN 'MAC'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%PBC%' THEN 'PBC'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%SWR%' THEN 'SWR'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%FHI%' THEN 'FHI'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%MXH%' THEN 'FHI'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%RTW%' THEN 'RTW'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%CTA%' THEN 'CTA'
            WHEN G.BranchID LIKE '%HSI%' THEN 'HSI'
            ELSE 'Kohler'
        END AS DIVISION
    FROM
        OUT.GUILD_QUALITY_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_PAGINATION_NEW_SURVEY G
    WHERE
        SURVEYSTATUS = 'Completed'
        -- REMOVED hardcoded for production loads
		--and Survey_ID='11575279' 
),
GUILD_QUALITY_DATA AS (
    -- Main CTE to link Survey data to EDW Jobs/Leads/Branches
    SELECT
        G.*,
        COALESCE(L.CUSTOMERID, J.CUSTOMERID) AS CUSTOMERID,
        COALESCE(L.LEADID, J.LEADID) AS EDW_LEADID,
        COALESCE(J.JOBID, J1.JOBID) AS JOBID,
        COALESCE(L.LP_CUSTOMERID, J.LP_CUSTOMERID) AS LP_CUSTOMERID,
        COALESCE(J.INSTALLERID_1, J1.INSTALLERID_1) AS INSTALLERID_1,
        COALESCE(J.InstallerID_2, J1.InstallerID_2) AS InstallerID_2,
        COALESCE(J.InstallerID_3, J1.InstallerID_3) AS InstallerID_3,
        COALESCE(J.InstallerID_4, J1.InstallerID_4) AS InstallerID_4,
        COALESCE(J.LP_INSTALLERID_1, J1.LP_INSTALLERID_1) AS LP_INSTALLERID_1,
        COALESCE(J.LP_InstallerID_2, J1.LP_InstallerID_2) AS LP_InstallerID_2,
        COALESCE(J.LP_InstallerID_3, J1.LP_InstallerID_3) AS LP_InstallerID_3,
        COALESCE(J.LP_InstallerID_4, J1.LP_InstallerID_4) AS LP_InstallerID_4
    FROM
        GUILD_QUALITY_DIVISION G
    LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON G.DIVISION = J.DIVISION AND G.EXTERNAL_ID = J.CONTRACTID
    LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J1 ON G.DIVISION = J1.DIVISION AND G.LEADID = J1.LP_LEADID
    LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_LEAD L ON G.DIVISION = L.DIVISION AND G.LEADID = L.LP_LEADID
),
GUILD_FINAL_ATTRIBUTES AS
(
    -- Joins EDW FACT_LEAD and DIM_BRANCH data for final attributes
    SELECT
        G.*,
        F.ENTRYDATE,
        F.SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
        F.SalesRep2_EmployeeID,
        F.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
        F.LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID,
        F.APPTDATE,
        B.BranchID AS BRANCHID_NG,
        F.PRODUCTID,
        F.LP_PRODUCTID,
        B.LP_BRANCHID,
        B.ReportingMarketID,
        B.LP_ReportingMarketID,
        B.LP_ReportingMarketTypeID,
        B.ReportingMarketTypeID
    FROM
        GUILD_QUALITY_DATA G
    LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_LEAD F ON G.DIVISION = F.DIVISION AND G.EDW_LEADID = F.LEADID
    LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B ON F.DIVISION = B.DIVISION AND F.BRANCHID = B.BRANCHID
),
GUILD_SALES_REPS AS (
    -- *** NEW CTE: Aggregates the UserFullName based on the Role for each Survey_ID ***
    SELECT
        Survey_ID,
        -- Pivot 1: Extract Sales Rep 1 Name (MAX ensures we get the name if it exists on any row)
        MAX(CASE WHEN role Like '%SALES REP 1%' THEN UserFullName ELSE NULL END) AS GuildSalesRep1_Employee,
        -- Pivot 2: Extract Sales Rep 2 Name
        MAX(CASE WHEN role LIKE '%SALES REP 2%' THEN UserFullName ELSE NULL END) AS GuildSalesRep2_Employee
    FROM
        GUILD_FINAL_ATTRIBUTES
    GROUP BY
        Survey_ID
)

-- FINAL SELECT: Consolidates all data into a single row per Survey_ID
SELECT
    G.[Survey_ID],
    CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(G.Response_Date, 19), 126) AS [Response_Date],
    CASE WHEN G.[Program] LIKE '%Demo%' THEN 'Demo No Sale Experience'
         WHEN G.[Program] LIKE '%Overall%' THEN 'Installation Experience New' END AS [Program],
    G.[CustomerID],
    G.[EDW_LEADID] AS [LeadID],
    G.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID],
    G.[SalesRep2_EmployeeID],
    -- *** NEW: Select the aggregated sales rep names ***
    R.GuildSalesRep1_Employee,
    R.GuildSalesRep2_Employee,
    G.[BRANCHID_NG] AS [BranchID],
    G.BRANCHID AS [BranchID_GQ], -- Original Guild Branch ID
    G.[ApptDate],
    G.[EXTERNAL_ID] AS [ContractID],
    G.[DIVISION],
    -- ... (Include all other columns from the original query, referencing G for general attributes) ...
    G.[ProductID],
    G.[InstallerID_1],
    G.[InstallerID_2],
    G.[InstallerID_3],
    G.[InstallerID_4],
    G.[productline] AS [Product_Line_InstallationExperience],
    CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(G.Creationdate, 19), 126) AS [Date_To_Survey],
    'US' AS [Country],
    'English' AS [Language],
    NULL AS [Unit],
    G.SOLD,
    NULL AS [DevelopmentCycle],
    G.[SalesOrganization],
    NULL AS [Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations],
    NULL AS [Main_Metric],
    CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(G.ServiceDate, 19), 126) AS [Service_Datetime],
    G.[CHANNEL],
    G.[productline] AS [ProductLine_InHomeConsultationExperience],
    NULL AS [Social_Unit_ID],
    NULL AS [On_Site_Quote_Satisfaction_Team_Score],
    NULL AS [Reason_for_Score],
    G.[Sales_Understanding],
    G.[Sales_Communication],
    G.[Sales_Punctuality],
    NULL AS [Sales_Professionalism],
    G.[Sales_Product_Knowledge],
    G.[Completeness_Of_Information],
    G.[Received_Quote],
    G.[Satisfaction_With_Quote],
    G.[Quote_Project_Start_Date],
    G.[Product_Demo],
    G.[Product_Demo_Benefits],
    G.[Reason_For_Not_Moving_Forward],
    G.[Decided_Against_Other],
    G.[Final_Comment],
    G.[Service_NPS],
    NULL AS [Reasons_For_Your_Score],
    NULL AS [Give_More_Feedback],
    G.[In_Home_Sales_Rating] AS [In_Home_Sales],
    G.[Install_Team_Rating] AS [Install_Team],
    G.[Installation_Rating] AS [Installation],
    G.[Product_Walkthrough],
    G.[Experience_Rating] AS [Experience],
    G.[Satisfaction_Rating] AS [Satisfaction],
    G.[Areas_For_Improvement_Comment] AS [Areas_For_Improvement],
    NULL AS [Areas_Of_Satisfaction],
    G.[Testimonial],
    G.[Additional_Comments],
    RIGHT(LEFT(G.[Professionalism_Rating], 2), 1) AS [Professionalism],
    RIGHT(LEFT(G.[Clarity_Helpfulness_Rating], 2), 1) AS [Clarity_Helpfulness],
    RIGHT(LEFT(G.[Future_COnsideration_Rating], 2), 1) AS [Future_Consideration],
    G.[ReasonForConsideration_Rating] AS [Reason_For_Consideration],
    G.[OtherReasonforConsideration] AS [Other_Reason_For_Consideration],
    G.[AdditionalFeedback],
    G.[SalesExperience],
    G.[InstallationQuality],
    G.[OverallSatisfaction],
    G.[AccountID] AS [LP_CustomerID],
    G.[LeadID] AS [LP_LeadID],
    G.[LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID],
    G.[LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID],
    G.[LP_BranchID],
    G.[LP_ProductID],
    G.[LP_InstallerID_1],
    G.[LP_InstallerID_2],
    G.[LP_InstallerID_3],
    G.[LP_InstallerID_4],
    GETDATE() AS [LastUpdateTS],
    G.ReportingMarketID AS [ReportingMarket_ID],
    G.LP_ReportingMarketID AS [LP_ReportingMarket_ID],
    G.LP_ReportingMarketTypeID,
    G.ReportingMarketTypeID,
    G.[ACCOUNTID] AS [Medallia_AccountID],
    NULL AS [Medallia_SalesRepID1],
    NULL AS [Medallia_ServiceTechID1],
    NULL AS [SalesRepActiveFlag],
    G.[Testimonial_Comments] AS [Testimonial_Additional_Comments],
    NULL AS [Demonstration_Additional_Comments],
    NULL AS [Experience_Additional_Comments],
    NULL AS [Likely_To_Recommend_Additional_Comments],
    NULL AS [Satisfaction_Additional_Comments],
    NULL AS [In_Home_Sales_Additional_Comments],
    NULL AS [Install_Team_Additional_Comments],
    NULL AS [Installation_Additional_Comments],
    NULL AS [Area_For_Improvement_Additional_Comments],
    G.[Areas_Of_Satisfaction_Comment] AS [Area_Of_Satisfaction_Additional_Comments],
    NULL AS [Area_For_Improvement_Rating],
    NULL AS [Area_Of_Satisfaction_Rating],
    G.[Program] AS [Template],
    NULL AS [GuildQuality_Survey_Id],
    G.VALUE AS [Amount],
    G.[Surveystatus] AS [Survey_status],
    CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(G.ContactCreationDate, 19), 126) AS [Customer_Creation_Date],
    CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(G.ProjectStartDate, 19), 126) AS [Project_Start_Date],
    CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(G.Creationdate, 19), 126) AS [Creationdate],
    NULL AS [Satisfaction_Score_in_Percentage],
    G.[NeedsAction] AS [Needs_Action],
    G.[Notes],
    G.[GoogleReviewBoost] AS [Google_Review_Boost],
    G.[VIPProgramAwarenessChoice] AS [VIP_Program_Awareness_Choice],
    G.[VIPProgramAwarenessComment] AS [VIP_Program_Awareness_Comment],
    G.[Testimonial_Choice],
    G.[Testimonial_Comment],
    G.[ReferralProgramAwareness_Choice] AS [Referral_Program_Awareness_Choice],
    G.[ReferralProgramAwareness_Comment] AS [Referral_Program_Awareness_Comment],
    'Guild Quality' AS [SurveyFlag],
    '1' AS [ActiveInd],
    CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(G.updatedAt, 19), 126) AS updatedAt,
    'N' AS ResurveyFlag,
    CONVERT(DATETIME, LEFT(G.LastActivityAt, 19), 126) AS LastActivityAt
FROM
    (
        SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Survey_ID ORDER BY EntryDate DESC) AS rownum
        FROM GUILD_FINAL_ATTRIBUTES
    ) G
INNER JOIN
    GUILD_SALES_REPS R ON G.Survey_ID = R.Survey_ID
WHERE
    G.rownum = 1 --and R.GuildSalesRep1_Employee IS NULL

scripts.text:
Update EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Responses
Set ActiveInd='1'
Where Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Responses where  
CAST(Response_Date as Date) between DATEADD(dd,-60,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))  --and
and CAST(Response_Date as Date) >'2024-08-30'
and SurveyFlag='GuildQuality'
---CAST(updatedAt as Date) between DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))  and 
--CAST(lastActivityAt as Date) between DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))
and Survey_ID not in 
(Select Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Invitations where 
Survey_Status in ('No Response','Abandoned','In Progress','Scheduled') and Active_Ind='1'
))

Update EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Responses
Set ActiveInd='1'
Where Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Responses where  
CAST(Response_Date as Date) BETWEEN DATEADD(mm,-4,EOMONTH(CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))) AND DATEADD(dd,-60,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))  -- and
and CAST(Response_Date as Date) >'2024-08-30' and SurveyFlag='GuildQuality'
--CAST(updatedAt as Date) BETWEEN DATEADD(mm,-3,EOMONTH(CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))) AND DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))  and 
--CAST(lastActivityAt as Date) BETWEEN DATEADD(mm,-3,EOMONTH(CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))) AND DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))
and Survey_ID not in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Invitations where Survey_Status in ('No Response','Abandoned','In Progress','Scheduled') and Active_Ind='1'
))

Update EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Responses
Set ActiveInd='0'
Where Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Responses where  
CAST(Response_Date as Date) BETWEEN DATEADD(mm,-3,EOMONTH(CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))) AND DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) ----and
and CAST(Response_Date as Date) >'2024-08-30' and SurveyFlag='GuildQuality'
--CAST(updatedAt as Date) between DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE))  and 
--CAST(lastActivityAt as Date) between DATEADD(dd,-14,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) and DATEADD(dd,-0,CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)) 
and Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Invitations where Survey_Status in ('No Response','Abandoned','In Progress','Scheduled') and Active_Ind='1'
))

Update EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Invitations
set Active_Ind='0'
Where Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Customer_Survey_Responses where UPPER(Survey_status)='COMPLETED' and ActiveInd='1')

Update EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_Survey_Invitations
Set Active_Ind='0'
where 
Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from OUT.GUILD_QUALITY_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_PAGINATION_NEW_SURVEY where UPPER(Surveystatus)='COMPLETED')

Update EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_Survey
Set ActiveInd='0'
where 
Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from OUT.GUILD_QUALITY_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_PAGINATION_NEW_SURVEY where UPPER(Surveystatus)!='COMPLETED')

Update EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey
Set ResurveyFlag=A.ResurveyFlag
--Select A.*,B.Survey_ID 
from EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey B left join
(Select Survey_ID,
CASE WHEN Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey_Invitations where Survey_Status='In progress' and Active_Ind=1 and SurveyFlag='Guild Quality') THEN 'Y'
WHEN  Survey_ID in (Select Survey_ID from EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey_Invitations where Survey_Status='INVITATION_RESENT' and SurveyFlag='Medallia') THEN 'Y' 
ELSE 'N' END as ResurveyFlag
 from EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey) A on A.Survey_ID=B.Survey_ID where B.ResurveyFlag!='Y'

Update A
Set A.ActiveInd=0
from EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_Survey A left join ODS.GUILD_QUALITY_DELETED_CUSTOMER_SURVEY B on A.Survey_ID=B.Survey_ID
where B.Survey_ID is not null
